ai_summary: Canara HSBC Life Insurance reported a strong Q1 FY27, demonstrating significant year-on-year growth across key metrics including New Business Premium (25.2%), Annualized Premium Equivalent (18.8%), and Value of New Business (28.8%), primarily driven by a strategic shift towards higher-margin protection and traditional product offerings. This robust performance led to a 20.2% increase in Profit After Tax and improved 13-month persistency, though a slight rise in the expense ratio to 20.7% and a marginal dip in the solvency ratio to 198% warrant monitoring.
